bio:

posts.caption:
𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟑 𝐁𝐌𝐖 𝐗𝐌 | 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐁𝐨𝐬𝐬 𝐒𝐔𝐕 🔥

• Engine: 4.4L Twin-Turbo V8 + Electric Motor (Plug-in Hybrid)
• Power: 653 HP | 800 Nm 
• Transmission: 8-Speed M Steptronic Automatic
• Drive: M xDrive (AWD)
• 0-100 km/h: 4.3 sec 
• Color: Alpine White with Black Accents

🔹 Extra Features:
• BMW M Hybrid System (First-ever electrified M SUV)
• Adaptive M Suspension Professional
• M Sport Differential (Rear-biased AWD)
• Iconic Illuminated Kidney Grille
• Split LED Headlight Design
• BMW Curved Display (iDrive 8)
• Ambient Lighting with Signature Red Roof Glow
• Premium Sound System (Bowers & Wilkins option)
• Carbon Fibre Interior Trim
• M Multifunction Steering Wheel (M1/M2 Buttons)
• M Sport Seats with XM Embossing
• Rear Luxury Lounge Seating
• Pure Electric Driving Mode (~50–80 km range)

𝐁𝐌𝐖 𝐙𝟒 𝐬𝐃𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝟐𝟎𝐢 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟎 | 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐁𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐎𝐩𝐞𝐧-𝐓𝐨𝐩 𝐋𝐮𝐱𝐮𝐫𝐲 & 𝐒𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 🇩🇪
• Color: San Francisco Red Metallic Exterior | Cognac Leather Interior
• Engine: 2.0L TwinPower Turbo 4-Cylinder
• Power: 197 HP (145 kW)
• Torque: 320 Nm
• Transmission: 8-Speed Steptronic Automatic
• Drive: Rear-Wheel Drive (RWD)
• 0–100 km/h: 6.6 Seconds
• Top Speed: 240 km/h 
​🔹 M Sport Performance & Styling:
• M Aerodynamics Package
• Adaptive LED Headlights
• 19" M Light-Alloy Wheels
• M Sport Brakes with Blue Calipers
• Black Soft-Top Convertible Roof
• High-Gloss Shadowline Exterior Trim
​🔹 Extra Features:
• BMW Live Cockpit Professional with Navigation
• 10.25” Touchscreen Infotainment Display
• M Sport Leather Seats with Integrated Headrests
• M Leather Steering Wheel with Paddle Shifters
• Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control
• Ambient Interior Lighting
• Front and Rear Park Assist with Rear View Camera
• Wireless Apple CarPlay Connectivity
• Keyless Entry & Push Start
• Wind Deflector 
​📍 Available at Alhusnain Motors Ltd
📍 Ngong Road, Malik Heights Building
📞 0702400400

𝐁𝐌𝐖 𝐌𝟑 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐆𝟖𝟎 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟑 | 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐈𝐬𝐥𝐞 𝐎𝐟 𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 💚🏁

• Engine: 3.0L Twin-Turbo Inline-6 (S58) 
• Power: 503 hp | 650 Nm 
• Transmission: 8-Speed M Steptronic Automatic 
• Drive: M xDrive (Switchable AWD / RWD) 🛞
• 0–100 km/h: ~3.4 seconds 
• Top Speed: 290 km/h (With M Driver’s Package) 🏁
• Color: Isle of Man Green Metallic 🌿 | Black Merino Leather Interior 🖤

🔹 Key Features:
• Adaptive M Suspension with M Differential 🛠️
• M Compound Brakes with Red Calipers 
• Carbon Fiber Roof (Weight Saving) 
• 19” Front & 20” Rear M Forged Alloy Wheels 
• M Sport Exhaust System 

• 12.3” Digital Cockpit + 14.9” Curved Display 
• BMW iDrive 8 + Wireless Apple CarPlay / Android Auto 
• Harman Kardon Surround Sound System 
• Ambient Lighting & M Head-Up Display 
• Adaptive Cruise Control + Lane Departure Warning 🛣️
• Parking Assistant Plus + 360° Camera 
• Comfort Access + M1/M2 Custom Drive Modes
